channel.title: NYRB AI 增强版
channel.description: 纽约书评 AI 自动总结

item.title: Visions of Depravity
item.description: AI 处理期间发生错误 (请检查配额): 429 You exceeded your current quota, please check your plan and billing details. For more information on this error, head to: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/rate-limits. item.title: How Should a Pixel Be?

For more information on this error, head to: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/rate-limits. item.content:encoded: AI 处理期间发生错误 (请检查配额): 429 You exceeded your current quota, please check your plan and billing details. For more information on this error, head to: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/rate-limits. To monitor your current usage, head to: https://ai.dev/rate-limit. * Quota exceeded for metric: generativelanguage.googleapis.com/generate_content_free_tier_requests, limit: 0, model: gemini-2.0-flash * Quota exceeded for metric: generativelanguage.googleapis.com/generate_content_free_tier_requests, limit: 0, model: gemini-2.0-flash * Quota exceeded for metric: generativelanguage.googleapis.com/generate_content_free_tier_input_token_count, limit: 0, model: gemini-2.0-flash Please retry in 4.392869157s.
